title: Activity Log doesn't show todays activity
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m trying to use the Activity Log to see recent updates, but the latest update it is showing is from yesterday. I’ve made changes on my board but don’t see anything come up in the Activity Log tab. I’ve also tried …

posts.author: MattG (Matthew Grover)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m trying to use the Activity Log to see recent updates, but the latest update it is showing is from yesterday. I’ve made changes on my board but don’t see anything come up in the Activity Log tab. I’ve also tried querying the activity_log via the API with the to field set to a value in the future but still the latest activity I see returned is from yesterday.
The documentation available here https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005310745-What-is-the-Activity-Log- suggests that you should be able to see updates from today in the log.
Any suggestions as to why today’s activity isn’t visible in the Activity Log?

thanks,

Matt

posts.author: snicho (Stephen Nicholson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Matt,

It sounds like you may have been impacted by the following system issue:

status.monday.com

Investigating issues with our Activity Log

monday.com's Status Page - Investigating issues with our Activity Log.

  • Stephen

posts.author: MattG (Matthew Grover)
posts.cookedHtml: Ah thanks, that does appear to have been the issue as it’s all working fine now. Will remember to check the status page next time.
